data.name: 背德浴場
data.detailed_description:
遊戲概述

您將扮演因情非得已患上怪病的男主角-龍司，為了被迫還債還被父親下藥導致每段時間都需要透過女性荷爾蒙接觸的發洩來緩和病情。透過經營浴場的收入來加強改裝店內裝潢，擴展業務提供更多服務與提高評價來吸引更多消費類型的族群前來洗澡。

但是由於身體染上怪病，主角不得不在性慾高漲的時候進行處理，此時可以想辦法以浴場老闆的名義吸引7位不同身分的女主角們前來消費，並進而培養感情進行更親近的互動。

遊戲玩法

除了經營浴場賺錢以外，還有前往深山採取異世界植物進行特效藥的製作高價販售，以及其他各種賺錢管道進行資金的賺取。玩家可以在一天的四個時段當中前往各個區域與各式各樣的人物進行交談與互動，獲取資訊與利益交換來提升自己的賺錢能力，獲得更高的報酬利益與增加與女主角們的好感度。

龍司的怪病若不即時處理，過夜後隔天便會被推入急診室緊急治療，進而損失一大筆財富，甚至可能因病身亡，因此要隨時注意他的生理狀態以避免遺憾。

人物介紹

  • 龍司

本作男主角，是一位天才藥劑師，因與醫學院教授的女兒有所部染而被踢出醫療團隊，同時又被迫接下父親龍平的債務而頂下了「天龍浴場」的經營權。外表斯文帥氣但滿肚子壞水，為了目的不擇手段，擅長社交互動又有不錯的外表因而容易取得他人的信任。

  • 加奈惠 (CV:鶴屋春人)

龍司的青梅竹馬，自小跟天才藥草學家-龍平學習藥草學而擁有豐富的藥草學知識，年紀輕輕就能獨自並經營著代代相傳的漢方藥局。對龍司有濃厚的好感，個性活潑開朗喜歡和人鬥嘴，常常在龍司最需要幫助的情況下無條件相挺協助，擁有朋友以上、戀人未滿的關係。

  • 琉美 (CV:噴太棒)

知名女畫家，同人誌界的大手，因繪製的人物與插畫極具商業價值，因此經濟狀況很不錯。繪製速度快速，品質又高，因此接不接案全看她個人心情。個性較木訥寡言，完全的行動派。喜歡一個人獨處，在浴場總是選擇包廂浴場進行消費。

  • 澪 (CV:藍沢夏癒)

女僕咖啡廳紅牌女店員，由於外觀可愛，聲音甜美，澪無論在哪裡都是目光的焦點。雖然工作面很吃香，卻受不了噁肥宅們的攻勢，平常必須陪笑，勉強自己去迎合客人的調侃和下流眼神。因此上班後精神疲憊，會想找個下班後的綠洲休息。

  • 霞 (CV:未來羽)

大學新手教師，海外名流學校畢業後即回國擔任教師，是一位有歐美基因的混血兒。母性堅強，是大學裡相當受到歡迎的人物，但常常因缺乏危機意識而沒有把握好與學生的距離感而讓許多男學生有非分之想，即使如此她還是認為這群學生都是單純又善良的好孩子。

  • 早苗 (CV:飴川紫乃)

新婚人妻，由於老公是非常成功的創業家，因此常常出差不在家，妻子雖然有優渥的生活條件但仍然覺得生活很無趣，因此喜歡去澡堂跟其他人妻團聊天。但由於本身條件不錯，常有人搭訕。因此欲求不滿也是相當明顯的，每天都在幻想著被男人們欺負。但又矛盾的堅守著自己是有已婚人士了，必須要潔身自愛。

  • 彩子 (CV:水野七海)

女警。工作上，她嚴肅專業，對待犯罪分子毫不手軟。然而，在內心深處，她隱藏著一個不為人知的一面，那就是她對某些禁忌事物的好奇和探索。她是個非常守紀律的人，對於自身為民服務深感榮幸。

  • 美樹 (CV:北板莉亜)

風俗女子，她的身材火辣，曲線玲瓏，總是穿著時尚且引人注目的衣服。性格開朗，溫柔且善於與人交際。她擁有一種難以抗拒的魅力能輕易地讓人放下戒備心。因此在本業進行工作時她能夠迅速捕捉客人的需求，提供他們渴望的服務，然而，她也有著一顆善良的心，經常會在暗地裡幫助有困難的人。

遊戲特色

  • 超過20組以上的動態CG

  • 超過40組以上的場景H互動

  • 多種類型的小遊戲

  • 9種不同的結局

data.short_description: 《背德浴場》是一款融合多款小遊戲的經營類遊戲，為了被迫還債父親欠黑社會的錢而頂讓下經營失敗的泡泡浴，進而改裝的浴場來賺錢還債。並與這段期間的7位女性顧客邂逅，在以還債為終極目標的前提下體驗當經營者與追求者的人生體驗。
data.supported_languages:
繁體中文, 英文, 日文*, 簡體中文, 韓文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound

data.name: Immoral-Bathhouse
data.detailed_description:
Game Overview

You play as Ryouji, a man who, due to a series of unfortunate events, has contracted a mysterious illness. After being drugged by his own father and burdened with his debts, Rouji discovers that his condition requires regular release through contact with female hormones to avoid worsening symptoms. To manage his finances and treat his condition, he takes over the management of the Tenryuu Bathhouse. By earning income through the bathhouse, he upgrades its interior, expands services, and raises its reputation to attract a wider range of customers.

However, when Ryouji’s libido spikes due to his illness, he must take action. Using his role as the bathhouse owner, he attempts to lure in seven different female protagonists, each with distinct backgrounds, as customers. Through repeated interactions, he gradually builds deeper emotional and physical connections with them.

Gameplay

In addition to managing the bathhouse for profit, players can venture into remote mountain areas to gather otherworldly herbs, craft special medicines, and sell them at high prices. There are also various other ways to earn money. Each in-game day is divided into four time periods, during which players can explore different areas, interact with various characters, obtain information, and engage in exchanges to improve income potential and increase favorability with the heroines.

If Ryouji’s illness is left untreated, he will collapse and be rushed to the emergency room the next day, resulting in a significant financial loss or even death. Players must constantly monitor his physical condition to avoid tragic consequences.

Character Introduction

  • Ryouji

The protagonist of the story. A genius pharmacist who was expelled from a medical team after getting involved with the daughter of a medical school professor. On top of that, he was forced to take over his father Ryuhei’s debt and ended up inheriting the management of the Tenryuu Bathhouse. He appears refined and handsome, but is full of scheming thoughts. Ruthless in pursuit of his goals, Ryouji is highly skilled in social interaction and easily gains others’ trust thanks to his charm and good looks.

  • Kanae (CV:鶴屋春人)

Ryouji’s childhood friend. From a young age, she studied herbalism under the brilliant herbalist Ryuhei and now possesses a wealth of knowledge in the field. Despite her youth, she runs a traditional herbal pharmacy passed down through generations. Kanae has strong feelings for Ryouji, is cheerful and spirited, and enjoys playful banter. She often supports Ryouji unconditionally during his most difficult times. Their relationship hovers between friendship and romance.

  • Rumi (CV:噴太棒)

A famous female illustrator and a top tier creator in the doujin scene. Her characters and illustrations are highly marketable, bringing her solid financial success. She works at incredible speed while maintaining exceptional quality, and only accepts commissions depending on her mood. Quiet and reserved, she is a woman of action. She prefers solitude and always chooses private rooms when visiting the bathhouse.

  • Mio (CV:藍沢夏癒)

A star waitress at a maid café. With her adorable appearance and sweet voice, Mio draws attention wherever she goes. Despite her popularity at work, she’s mentally drained by the unwanted advances from creepy otaku customers. Forced to smile and tolerate their vulgar jokes and lecherous stares, she often seeks a peaceful oasis after her exhausting shifts.

  • Kasumi (CV:未來羽)

A rookie university lecturer who returned to Japan after graduating from a prestigious overseas institution. A beautiful half-Japanese woman with Western heritage, she has a strong maternal presence and is very popular among students. However, her lack of awareness often leads to blurred boundaries with male students, resulting in unwanted fantasies. Still, she insists they are just innocent and kind hearted kids.

  • Sanae (CV:飴川紫乃)

A newlywed housewife. Her husband, a successful entrepreneur, is frequently away on business trips. Though she lives in luxury, she finds life dull and meaningless. She enjoys going to the bathhouse to chat with other married women. Due to her attractive appearance, she’s often approached by men. Her dissatisfaction is obvious, she fantasizes daily about being dominated by men yet she struggles with guilt, believing she must remain pure as a married woman.

  • Ayako (CV:水野七海)

A police officer. On the job, she is strict and professional, showing no mercy to criminals. However, deep down, she harbors a hidden curiosity toward forbidden desires and taboo experiences. Highly disciplined, she takes great pride in her role as a public servant.

  • Miki (CV:北板莉亜)

A sex worker with a stunning figure and striking curves, always dressed in fashionable and eye catching outfits. She is cheerful, gentle, and excels at social interaction. Her irresistible charm easily disarms others, allowing her to quickly sense what her clients need and deliver the experiences they crave. Despite her profession, she has a kind heart and often helps those in need behind the scenes.

Game Features

  • Over 20 animated CG scenes

  • More than 40 H-interaction scenes across various locations

  • A variety of mini-games

  • 9 different endings

data.short_description: 《Immoral-Bathhouse》is a management game with mini-games where you renovate a failed soapland into a bathhouse to repay your father's mafia debt. Meet seven female customers and balance life as a bathhouse owner and a man pursuing romance while racing to pay off the debt.
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese, English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support

Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i3
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 560 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows7/8/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core i5
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 / AMD Radeon HD 6870 DirectX 版本: 11
  • Storage: 5 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound
